item.title: Barrett Pall on the manosphere in the last five years
item.description: This was difficult for me to watch. I was aware of how atrocious the manosphere is but to listen to these disgusting fucks talking brings out another level of rage in me. There are too many of them. Way too many.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Need help locating someone
item.description: Breaking the selfie rule for good reason. I am looking for a young man named Don who was out at the South Padre Island jetties yesterday (May 12th) around 6pm. He had an orange surfboard and helped save my daughter and her best friend from a massive current that pulled them rapidly out to sea. I was too in shock and dropping from the adrenaline after swimming out after them that I don't think I thanked you properly. I owe you my life 3xs over. If anyone knows Don or if Don himself happens to see this, please DM me. Selfie is from that day so you know I am who I say I am. And if I never find my surfer angel, just know that we will always know you saved us and we you owe more than we can ever repay. Most viral edit: Thank you all for giving visibility to this. I don't want anything other than more visibility. Let Don, the Surfer Angel know that we love and appreciate him in the highest regard.
item.dc:creator: nihil777

item.title: ICE (again)
item.description: Marie-Therese Ross, the 85 year old widow of a U.S Army veteran, was recently caught up in the Trump regimes cruel and inhumane immigration policies and ended up stay 16 days in a Louisiana detention facility when the regime claimed she had overstayed her visa. The conditions she described were terrible. Over crowded rooms, babies crying, other mothers crying because they didn’t know where their children were. “Some of them didn’t know where their children were,'' she said. ‘’I think it’s terrible for a woman not to know where her children are.” What the Trump regime is doing is beyond evil.
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: The shareholders were just fine turns out
item.description:
https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/12/mayor-mamdani-new-york-pied-terre-property-tax-real-estate.html
https://abc7ny.com/post/mayor-mamdani-says-new-york-city-has-balanced-budget-fy-27/19088481/
https://www.nyc.gov/mayors-office/news/2026/03/mayor-mamdani-advances-new-york-city-s-first-free-child-care-pro
https://www.nbcnewyork.com/new-york-city/mamdani-grocery-store-city-owned-locations-la-marqueta-harlem/6489675/
https://ny1.com/nyc/all-boroughs/politics/2026/05/07/mamdani-announces--31m-judgment-against-bad-bronx-landlords
Put Socialists in charge and shit actually gets done. MILD SHOCK. Democrats all over the country could be doing these exact things AND MORE. They won’t, because they are here to serve capital and placate you enough that you don’t riot. Time for a change

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1687 (waltz pendant)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This Raven supports Palestine.
False knees. (I wanna see this version of Pacific Rim so bad)
Pippin tax! This morning, Pippin woke me up before my alarm by politely standing on my forehead and gently and politely prying an eye open, didn't make a sound, just stared at me. What a goofy dinosaur. Today's message from Pippin: "What doing? [Predator click noises] what doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: danwhitfield

item.title: 2018 Sky King
item.description: On August 10, 2018, a Horizon Air De Havilland Canada Dash 8-400 was stolen from Seattle–Tacoma International Airport (Sea–Tac) by 28-year-old Richard Russell, a Horizon Air ground service agent with no piloting experience.[2] After Russell performed an unauthorized takeoff, two McDonnell Douglas F-15 Eagle fighters were scrambled to intercept the aircraft. Sea–Tac air traffic control made radio contact with Russell, the sole occupant, who described himself as a "broken guy ... got a few screws loose, I guess." About 1 hour and 15 minutes after takeoff, Russell successfully executed a barrel roll before purposely crashing the aircraft on the sparsely populated Ketron Island in Puget Sound with the intent to die by suicide. There were no collateral human injuries; Russell was the sole fatality. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2018_Horizon_Air_Bombardier_Q400_incident
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Gender bias so horrendous that everyone overlooked the racism hiding in plain sight.
item.description: Trump accused her of being familiar with filth, claiming she understood it better than he did, maintaining that her question sprang from an intimacy with and preference for it. This is deep in the bone core racism, grandpa racism.

item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: But why?
item.description: Why does Imgur allow its blocked users to view and search the blocker's profile and posts? People block others for a plethora of reasons, some examples being: harassment, disliked content, contrarians etc. I, myself, being someone who normally doesn't "fire from the hip" when commenting on most topics (especially those that are nuanced and complex), usually expend an inordinate amount of time and effort to formulate my response, *try* to check myself for bias, and confirm that my position has some shred of evidence. I DON'T WANT TO SPEND 20 MINS DOING ALL THIS FOR A COMMENT I CAN'T POST!!! If the explanation is something like, "research shows this is best intervention for deescalation", then fine, otherwise I find it to be nothing more than a ploy to keep traffic metrics up for ad revenue. Yes, I checked my app was updated, signed out/in, cleared my cache, and reinstalled to verify it wasn't a tech issue on my end. ≈≈≈ TL;DR: OP had a minor crashout bc they spent 20mins on comment not realizing they were blocked and said comment wouldn't be posted.
item.dc:creator: spittleteets

item.title: GovBrief Today #468
item.description: Pete Hegseth will preach on the National Mall this Sunday at a nine-hour festival to rededicate the country to the Christian God. Taxpayer money set aside for America's 250th birthday will help pay for it. The First Amendment forbids exactly this. Freedom 250 is already under congressional investigation for misusing federal funds. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives that trampling the Bill of Rights belongs in the same investigation. I've emailed 7,391 stories over 468 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss pictures, data, and easy-click links on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260513-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/un-sanctions [2] https://go.govbrief.today/xi-warns-trump [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may13 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/war-powers-7 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hospice-homehealth [6] https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-spokesperson [7] https://go.govbrief.today/utah-measles [8] https://go.govbrief.today/vance-medicaid [9] https://go.govbrief.today/lutnick-transcript [10] https://go.govbrief.today/milwaukee-fbi [11] https://go.govbrief.today/georgia-redistrict [12] https://go.govbrief.today/warsh-confirmed [13] https://go.govbrief.today/border-drones [14] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-dcbar [15] https://go.govbrief.today/mesa-pepperspray [16] https://go.govbrief.today/colombian-congo [17] https://go.govbrief.today/el-salvador-deportations [18] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-christian [19] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sued-library [20] https://go.govbrief.today/rollins-religious-messages Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS

item.title: Please look please look please look I did the art for this game!!!
item.description: Oh hi good morning, Shia here, Overshia on bluesky, I am really freaking happy today. Ages ago I sent some of my Fallout fan books to Bethesda because my friend and I are huge Fallout fans. The lead designer saw it and contacted me when he quit the company and went to make his own indy game and commissioned me to draw a SHITTON OF ART. Today it seems there's going to be a collectors edition of it! THAT'S ALL MY PAINTINGS! AAAAAH
item.dc:creator: Drunkfu

item.title: Thats how we do it in Australia
item.description: https://www.realcommercial.com.au/news/trumps-12b-aus-skyscraper-dumped-after-massive-backlash/?campaignType=external&campaignChannel=syndication&campaignName=ncacont&campaignContent=&campaignSource=newscomau&campaignPlacement=realestatemodule
item.dc:creator: scimitar

item.title: The biggest scam capitalism ever got away with was making us think were making the decision
item.description:
I used to smoke. A lot. It sucked but we thought we liked it. It was slavery through drug addiction.
One of the problems with smoking is that isn't bad enough for you. It takes many many years before you notice how it has ruined you. Then it's too late.
The US government has pretty much always known it was bad for you, but they make a loooooooooooooot of tax money....
Don't do it.
If you kill one person, you go to prison. If you kill millions, your company might pay a fine.
item.dc:creator: dickblack12
